content.text:
[cron:6b4b34f0-54e2-4041-80fd-cd0a30f82b32 Squad Daily Changelog] Generate the daily changelog. Read SQUAD.md for team members and repos. Read SOUL.md for the exact professional template and writing style. Read TOOLS.md for the Slack webhook URL. Write a clean, professional end-of-day summary covering what shipped, deployments, incidents, and watch items for tomorrow. Include a team summary line. Post to Slack via the webhook in TOOLS.md. Log to memory.
Current time: Friday, April 10th, 2026 — 6:00 PM (Asia/Calcutta) / 2026-04-10 12:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
